anti_capture_rules: Lab outputs must separate evidence, hypothesis, and vision.
No lab may canonize its own high-impact claims without non-adjacent witness.

authority_lease.scope: Template authority for decentralized lab design only.

build_plan.production_grade_definition: A lab seed is production-grade only when its research loop, review loop, data policy, and publication path are explicit.

canon_conditions: The lab produces reproducible outputs with visible challenges and corrections.
compost_conditions: The lab becomes a prestige label without reproducible work.

strongest_objections: The lab may become status theater instead of a reproducibility engine.

failure_conditions: Research claims cannot be replayed, challenged, or corrected.
claim.scope: A decentralized AI lab seed aligned to public challenge and reproducible evidence.
success_conditions: The lab produces citable artifacts with standing, corrections, and open methods.
claim.text: This lab seed can birth a decentralized research cell that compounds evidence instead of status.

commons_return.minimum_return: Research methods, negative results, and reusable artifacts remain public unless safety requires delay.

title: Lab Seed Template
